articles.title: GHSA: kin-openapi: ValidationHandler.Load() Fail-Open Authentication Bypass via NoopAuthenticationFunc Default

### Summary
`ValidationHandler.Load()` in `getkin/kin-openapi` silently replaces a nil `AuthenticationFunc` with `NoopAuthenticationFunc`, which always returns `nil` without performing any credential check.
